dialog.stepLabel: Xiaoju: "I've never seen them get this excited before...."

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: I've never seen them get this excited before.

items.speaker: Luyu
items.text: Well, Rover was the one that rescued all of them and even comes to visit every now and then. Of course, they love {Male=him;Female=her}.

options.text: They all look very happy and in good shape.

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: Yes, the ones that were injured are now fully recovered.

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: The skinny and startled kittens have also made themselves comfortable and are all growing healthily.

items.speaker: Luyu
items.text: Rover, the rescue team was able to save so many cats and earn its name all thanks to you!

items.speaker: Luyu
items.text: You are our key supporter of the Kitty Rescue Project. Please allow me to appoint you as Captain of the Kitty Rescue Team!

items.speaker: Luyu
items.text: I'm the Vice-Captain! I shall become invincible under the protection of the Captain's formidable powers!

items.speaker: Luyu
items.text: Bravo! My love! My best buddy! Our work of saving cats continues!

items.speaker: Xiaoju
items.text: Okay, okay, Captain, Vice-Captain, please mind your feet. There's a little one trying to sneak out under you.
